mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_reply (board_id, username, reply_content, deleted, parents_reply_id) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{userName}, #{replyContent}, 0, #{parentsReplyId} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.reply_id AS replyId, r.board_id AS boardId, r.username, r.reply_content AS replyContent, r.deleted, m.nickname AS nickName FROM board_reply r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.username = m.username WHERE r.board_id = #{boardId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.reply_id DESC;
